nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Philippine honey buzzard
nodes.summary: Philippine honey buzzard（Philippine honey buzzard，学名 Pernis steerei），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括猎捕压力、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is moist tropical primary lowland forest and montane forest up to 2,000 meters above sea level but is most often seen below 1,400 meters

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The IUCN has assessed this species as least concern, the population is believed to be declining due to deforestation from land conversion, Illegal logging and slash-and-burn farming. This species also experiences hunting pressure for both meat and the pet trade

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The IUCN has assessed this species as least concern, the population is believed to be declining due to deforestation from land conversion, Illegal logging and slash-and-burn farming. This species also experiences hunting pressure for both meat and the pet trade
